items.title: Heated Rivalry, The Housemaid and Fourth Wing: TikTok launches BookTok bestseller list
items.summary: The inaugural top 20 is entirely made up of female authors, with Chloe Walsh appearing most frequently.

items.title: China acquired capacity to build 50 nuclear power reactors simultaneously: Official report
items.summary: China’s total installed nuclear power capacity has reached 125 million kilowatts, ranking first globally, State-run CCTV said, quoting the China Nuclear Energy Association report

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Witkoff and Kushner to Go to Pakistan for Talks on Iran
items.summary: The two American envoys are expected to leave Saturday for Pakistan. Iran’s foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi, arrived in Islamabad on Friday.
